---
id: escalate
title: "Escalate an approval request"
description: "Manually sets the request status to ESCALATED. Automated escalation runs via the batch job."
sidebar_label: "Escalate an approval request"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Escalate an approval request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/approvals/{id}/escalate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Manually sets the request status to ESCALATED. Automated escalation runs via the batch job.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
